name: security-posture records a trend delta against a prior snapshot
command: printf '%s' '[{"component":"lodash","severity":"critical","fixed_in":"4.17.21","remediation_status":"fixed","source":"cisa-kev","disclosed_at":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","remediated_at":"2026-01-03T00:00:00Z"},{"component":"left-pad","severity":"medium","remediation_status":"open","source":"osv"}]' > f.json && printf '{"vulnerability_density":1.0}' > prior.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/security-posture.sh" --findings f.json --deps 500 --prior prior.json --json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.trend===3?0:1)' && echo q13-trend 1>&2
